chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No.D –790 of 2018 along with C.P Nos. D-7090, 7261, 7359, 8056, 8779 of 2017 and C.Ps No.2080, 3376 of 2018, 6209 of 2019, C.P Nos. 1737, 1830, 3978, 6528 of 2020 and C.P No.D-636 of 2021. Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For orders on CMA No.832/2021. 2. For orders on CMA No.19297/2020. 3. For hearing of CMA No.35292/2018. 4. For hearing of CMA No.11510/2018. 3. For hearing of main case. 28.04.2021 M/s. Nadeem A. Shaikh and Saleem Michel advocates for the petitioners in C.P No.D-790 of 2018 and 7090 of 2017. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Kalwar along with Mr. Muhammad Yasir, advocates for the petitioners in C.P No.D-6528/2020. Mr. Mansoor Ali Oanhwar & Muzaffar Ali advocates for the petitioners in C.P Nos. 8056/2017, 3376/2018, 7261/2017, 2080/2018 and 1830/2020. Mr. Usman Farooq advocate for the petitioners in C.P Nos. 7090/2017 and 636/2021. Ms. Seema Zaidi, DPG. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Ali Gul Sanjrani, Deputy Secretary SGA&CD. ----------- All the counsel appearing in these petitions either on behalf of the petitioners and on behalf of the respondents have been heard at length and with their consent all these petitions are disposed of in the following terms:- “1) That the cases of differently-abled persons which have not been rejected so far would be considered by the competent authority strictly in accordance with law and if those persons qualify for appointment on the sanctioned / designated post, their cases may be considered for appointment in the respective departments, keeping in view 5% quota as prescribed under The Sindh Empowerment of „Persons with Disabilities Act‟ 2018. 2) That the above exercise should be completed by the Government of Sindh preferably within a period of three months‟ time from the date of passing of this order in accordance with law.” With these directions, all the instant petitions with all the listed / pending application(s) stand disposed of.

Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Ali Gul Sanjrani, Deputy Secretary SGA&CD. ----------- All the counsel appearing in these petitions either on behalf of the petitioners and on behalf of the respondents have been heard at length and with their consent all these petitions are disposed of in the following terms:- “1) That the cases of differently-abled persons which have not been rejected so far would be considered by the competent authority strictly in accordance with law and if those persons qualify for appointment on the sanctioned / designated post, their cases may be considered for appointment in the respective departments, keeping in view 5% quota as prescribed under The Sindh Empowerment of „Persons with Disabilities Act‟ 2018. 2) That the above exercise should be completed by the Government of Sindh preferably within a period of three months‟ time from the date of passing of this order in accordance with law.” With these directions, all the instant petitions with all the listed / pending application(s) stand disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E
